situation: Moved into a shared flat (WG) in Berlin-Mitte. Landlord lives abroad and refused to sign the Wohnungsgeberbestätigung form, claiming it was not legally required for subtenants.
rejection_reason: Missing Wohnungsgeberbestätigung (landlord confirmation form). Staff at Bürgeramt refused to register without it as required by §19 BMG.
what_worked: Contacted the Mieterverein (tenant association) who sent a formal letter to the landlord explaining the legal obligation. Landlord complied within 2 days and sent signed form via email. Scanned copy accepted at next appointment.
what_failed: Showing up without the form and explaining the situation verbally. Asking a neighbor to vouch for the residency. Attempting to get a landlord attestation from the Hausverwaltung instead.
